name: Fox'es Kamish Bread
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
Lightly grease and flour cookie sheets.
In a large bowl, mix together all ingredients with a wooden spoon until well combined.
Shape the dough into 3 long strips on the prepared cookie sheets (about 1-inch in height).
Sprinkle each strip with cinnamon and sugar.
Bake for about 20 minutes or until golden brown and cooked through.
Turn off the oven.
Cut the bread into slices.
Turn each slice over.
Return to the oven to dry out slightly, until as crisp as desired.
